review_text:
Nice and close to the beach, jetty and everything Coffs has to offer. The park itself is clean and tidy with impeccable amenities. Camp Kitchens are well equipped both indoor and outdoor available. The pool is a standout feature and pedal carts and jumping pillow will keep the kids happy too.
Large roomy van sites, mostly nice level double slabs for easy set ups.

There is no personal service when booking in all is done by text message.  We were travelling with another couple booked together was not put together (but we advised them we were together when booked sites).  Didn't know we were together till we got in the park  We have a bigger van put us in a tight spot to back the van in with a 100 point turn.   Plenty of other sites were available.   Sent a review when left over a week ago and still no contact.  Great for families.
Great park. Top spot and facilities.

We had a 4 day stay here, early check in which was great after a 5 hour road trip from Brisbane. 2 rooms 4 beds, perfect size for our crew.

Little sad that the weather was wet most of the stay, but kids had fun.  We had 6-8 other family friends stay there also for a comp.  Great to have other families there so kids all played together, even when it was pouring down rain.

Kids jumped in the pool only once

Plenty of things to do if it wasn't raining
Once  you follow the little  road down you eventually  find the location.

We only stayed on non power site for the night while passing through but seemed like a nice park. Good location to club, surf club and beach front. Showers clean and large. Cafe on site but did not try. Warm welcome. Will stay longer another time.
Loved it
Great park for children. SItes a good size. amenities ang grounds spotless. Staff very friendly and helpful.
Great location, lots of facilities onsite, walking distance to beach and good size of Cabin.
Pretty good overall

Actually a pretty good park and sort of what I would expect from a BIG4 Holiday park. Some nice shady places, a pool, beach access and a cafe/bistro that operates for lunch and dinner. Maybe breakfast, I can’t remember. Cafe prices were ok. $62 for a powered I found a bit steep, but it seems like this is where the trend is going.

I just struggle to understand where the $11 uplift from an unpowered site comes from. How is one using $11 on water and electricity with a campervan or caravan?

Anyhow, I guess one pays for the brand a convenience of the location, but I still can’t se the justification. But that’s me. At the end of the of the day after a 12 hour drive, it was nice to be greeted by friendly staff and a clean and well maintained location.

But regardless, I cannot get my head around that a unpowered tent sit is over $50 these days. Half, if not third of the footprint of a camper or caravan but nearly same price.

End of rant. Still a nice Caravan Park

This was the worst campsite we have stayed at so far. The staff were quite unfriendly, which set the tone from the start. The WiFi did not work at all during our stay, which was frustrating as it is advertised as an available service.

The overall atmosphere felt quite restrictive, with a lot of rules and passwords everywhere, which made it less relaxing than expected.

There is definitely room for improvement, especially in customer service and basic facilities.

Great park to take kids! Don’t need to leave the park if you don’t want to, heaps of fixed play equipment, FANTASTIC pool with huge toddler splash area, on site cafe and a short stroll to the beach. My toddler loved the pool and riding his bike around the park
Awesome park, great facilities and close to beaches, shops etc...

Excelente caravan park! Tiene todas las comodidades necesarias y es un excelente lugar para familias! Las parcelas son grandes, el lugar cuenta con barreras y seguridad privada, bbq, pileta, mini golf, espacio de juegos , muy lindo! Lo unico que mejoraria es la atencion en la recepcion, cierran muy temprano y quizas un viajero necesita mas tiempo abierto por lo menos hasta las 9. Pero lo recomiendo 100%

Awesome park with great amenities and in the perfect location. Both Surf and calm Beach access was a simple 1 minute walk to either. Could not fault it in any aspect. We stayed there as part of an East Coast Caravanning trip and would have no hesitation in recommending to anyone.

Toller Holiday Park ! Sehr großflächig und viele Angebote für die Kinder. Leider gibt es ziemlich viele Fledermäuse und damit vieles das vom Baum runterfällt 😂. Macht aber nichts, das ist ja die Natur.
Die Lage ist großartig, nur 20 Minuten zu Fuß von der Plaza entfernt und nur ein paar Schritte weit vom Creek und dem Strand !
Auch die Waschräume etc. sehr sauber gehalten. Weiter so !
Next to water,  excellent pool, water slides and playground.  Have stayed before,  and will again

Rooms were nice and clean, the pool closed really early so we couldn’t even really enjoy it. We couldn’t hire out the little kids bikes past 5pm even though it’s light until 8pm? So I booked them for 9am, we got handed keys to unlock the padlock and it wouldn’t unlock. A groundskeeper was called, and he took a further 20 min to open it so we lost any Time we had to ride them…

Several turkeys roaming around with dislocated legs.. honestly traumatic to see even for little kids. They must have been ran over by a car in the park?

Other than that, the park is in a beautiful location and so close to everything.

Perhaps daylight savings time could mean extended pool hours and bike hours.

(If not a sign should be put up near the pool and bikes so people know the hours of trade)
Great park for familys or those passing through. Lots if big sites, fantastic kids pool, awsome camp kitchen and free activities.
Dyrt och slitet.. inte värt.

I really love Park beach Big 4 Caravan park. Excellent location a short walk to the amazing Coffs creek and beach. This Big 4 has a lovely swimming pool which is family friendly. Multiple camp kitchens. It has a great vibe. Good security. All amenities are spotlessly clean. Bbqs are spotless. The camping sites both powered and non powered have ample shade, sites are mowed and level. So great to not need to level the van.  Walking distance to pubs and beaches. Short drive to the jetty, shops. In the heart of town. But beachside and quiet at night. Will definitely camp here again.

Visited for the first time, stayed 4 nights and decided to stay an extra night because we didn’t want to leave! We had a powered site and it was in between the trees, lovely spot nice breeze.  Our fav big4 yet, great amenities & the pool and games room was a hit for the kids. Can’t wait to come back!
Very tight space for cars beside your caravan. Good concrete pad. Amenities are good. Pool is enjoyed by the children and great play area's inside and outside. Close to the beach.
Fabulous location and holiday park. Highly recommended.

This is a highly regarded holiday park where I stayed at an ensuite site. The kitchen and all facilities offered are excellent, and the swimming pool is among the best I've experienced. There are multiple mini game areas suitable for all age groups, providing entertainment for guests of different ages. However, a significant drawback was the poor mobile network reception, which made it impossible to access my bank app or use the park's wifi system. The connectivity issues were quite frustrating, suggesting that the park might benefit from investing in improved signal coverage to promote a more seamless, signal-free experience.

great amenities
great part of the world
perfect to stay when visiting the family

Our third time staying here and we absolutely love coming back — it’s such a great spot for families. The pool provides all-day entertainment, there’s an onsite café, the sites and amenities are clean, and it’s an excellent base to explore Coffs Harbour and surrounds.

My only minor complaint is that this was the first time we stayed towards the back end of the park, closest to what I’m assuming is the older amenities block. A few shower heads needed attention, and it desperately needs a fan to help circulate the air — some days I was going in hot and sweaty and leaving the same way! 🥵
It was a pretty good unpaired site

Great holiday nice room and putt putt golf, a big pool with a water park and slides for kids.
Staff were helpful when needed.
Very short walk to the beach.
Good air conditioning.
Needed to get a new knife to cook with ours was blunt, but that's the worst thing that happened!

Great caravan park. Amenities are clean, pool is clean. Plenty of things for the little and big kids. Location is amazing. Can walk out to the beach, take a bike ride out to the harbour. Super easy text check in and out options. Roads a little bumpy for scooters but you can still ride them. Coffee available to purchase on site. Kids room with TV Great for the kids to hang out. Would definitely return!
Very pretty park with a lovely resort style pool area. Amenities were clean. Close to the beach.

Rang in on a wish and a prayer. We have stayed many times before so thought we would give it a shot in the hope a blade of grass was available for us to park up on for the night. We were in luck. In fact, our site way down the back was large enough that we could have shared it with other travellers in a camper van. Thanks for looking after us and we are long time Big4 members.

Beautiful park - amenities were great and there was so much for the kids to do. Our son loved the water park and the jumping pillow, and the moment other kids were acting up the staff politely pulled them up and when it continued they moved them on. Was awesome to see. Our site was great and we had a BBQ facility right across from us and lots of open grass spaces for the kids. Would definitely stay again!

We stayed here for four nights on a nonpowered grass camping site. Place was really nice, with a lovely pool that the kids enjoyed playing in, and mini putt which was a great addition. The distance to the kitchen, the only kitchen, was quite far from our campsite, and was a bit annoying to have to walk that far just for small things. We also were constantly frustrated by bin chickens and turkeys getting into our food. Every time we went out, they would break into boxes and bags and steal our food. It was a constant annoyance. Perhaps they could perform some kind of pest control. Lovely location though. Would recommend it.
Out family have a great time here!  Staff and facilities were great!!
Done tent camping here. Nice place ,staff is good and helpful. Large size for tent. Facility like camp kitchen is big ,bathroom are nice and big too.

캠핑장 내 수영시설은 최대깊이 1.2미터 입니다.
7세미만 어린이는 혼자서 놀기 어려워요.

캠핑장 규모 압도적이고 시설도 깨끗합니다.
다시 방문한다면 주변  해변가에서 종일 놀 것 같습니다.
습기가 없고 물이 너무 깨끗해요.

Amenities and activities in the park make it almost unnecessary to leave the place. The park is in easy access to beach and waterway. All staff are both helpful and very friendly. The park is quite busy. But there is very minimal noise which makes it feel at ease as well.
Great family friendly park with good amenities. Plenty of shady campsites. Awesome location close to the beach and Coffs creek for little ones to swim in. Highly recommend.
Drive through sites are wonderfully long, facilities are clean and check-in process is essentially automated.
Very good experience!
Great location, pool, play areas, staff facilities.  Only missing a outdoor spa for all. Extremely central and beach is across the road

Charged us $58 for a powersite. Plenty of shade. It’s a family park with lots of kids. Shallow swimming pool. If you want to get away from kids, it’s impossible, they are everywhere. No pets allowed. Lot of things for kids like amusement machines, go cart, trampoline, pool table, cafe, playground and a big tv at community lounge. Clean bathroom and toilet and close to the beach
Great holiday for family. Clean villa, easy access to shops, cafe and beach.

We stayed three nights and loved it. Great amenity and cafe. Obviously full of kids in pool. As an experienced caravan traveller we never check in before we do a walk around and pick a good spot. Shade, privacy and sun angle, then when we check in ask for a specific site number. Most times we get what we asked for.

Great camping, very close to the beach(s), great location and good service. Excellent sanitaire/showers etc, large spots, brilliant pool for kids (would be very, very noisy in high season as is perfect for kids....), excellent kitchen area with grills, ovens, micro wave, tables.

We recently had an absolutely beautiful stay at the park beach big4. Staff were lovely and welcoming. The layout of the park is great and the facilities were clean and tidy. Its a great location for external activities in the area or just lock in and relax and enjoy what the park offers. Its always such a peaceful and friendly environment each time we stay.

This wasn't a good experience at all. Compared to the other big 4 cabins we have stayed in, the cabins were tiny and the unclean. Not all the beds were made, and there are no ceiling fans! We had to buy fans as it was so hot and the  the aircon is only in the living room. On top of this, my son who is 5yrs old, had a severe medical issue with his ears and stomach and had to go to hospital for the pain and sickness. He was vomiting all night and morning. So we decided it would be best to take him home to recover and see his doctors. So we had to leave the accommodation one day early. We requested under these extenuating circumstances to be able to get a refund for the second night as we needed to travel back home to Brisbane. They said no because of policy. I understand there are policies in place. But this was a different circumstance, we didn't just change our mind we even had a letter from the hospital doctors to confirm it. We left at 8am, we didn't just hang around. We really needed that money to put towards the trip home and my son's medical expenses. They said credit but not refund. We were not coming back we never come down south, this was once off for a special trip. It was only one night we had left, if it was a week for sure maybe different but we just wanted to go home to help him. It is really disappointing as this is meant to be a family friendly establishment but they do not consider different situations and care about families at all. I do not recommend going there. And when I asked the staff about extenuating circumstances she walked away to talk to management and said I don't want to push it? As if making a reasonable request for $250 was pushing it. I have even written a email to management and have not even had a really. Really terrible experience.
We stayed for 5 nights in our caravan. Sites were clean and had plenty of room. Amenities were very clean.

Recently stayed here on our way back down from qld,
Gorgeously kept park with a great cafe and plenty of entertainment for the kids, incredibly clean and manicured gardens and areas.
Pool and slides plus all other facilities are amazing.
Fabulous for kids and not over crowded.

Stayed in 2 different cabins and a powered site. Cabins were clean and great, large and reasonably priced, second cabin didn’t have a toaster or kettle and when we informed them before leaving were given credit for the next 12 months which is very nice.

Powered site had 2 concrete slabs that were well maintained and not overcrowded at all, amenities were good also.

Reception is busy and they don’t answer phones which sucks but will call back, had one incredibly lovely staff and one who was quite rude! Despite this I Would still  highly recommend this place and will happily come back.
We booked camp site and it was good, facilities are very clean

Nice facilities, good location
We had a great time

Amazing camping!!! We went only for one night because we were traveling, but I would have loved to stay longer. The amenities, the common areas, the cafe in front of the pool, the events they organize like movie nights, all excellent. Loved it

We free camped. Had a great spot amongst the trees. Toilets and amenities were clean and very modern. Service was good at reception. A little walk to the beach, but nothing seems to be on the beach in Coffs. A great spot to stay if you have kids.

We really love Cabin and wish it is my home. We feel
More very comfortable and very neat room.

Great holiday park - plenty to do for families: pool, jumping pillow, pedal carts, games room and daily movie.

We would definitely stay here again.

Rented a campsite for our campervan during a road trip.
The grounds were nice and well maintained. The bathrooms and showers were clean. The pool was great - especially for kids.
What was very disappointing (and is preventing me from giving a 5 star review) is that the website says that they are able to accommodate requests for site choice. When booking, we specifically asked for a grassy site with shade and trees (we have a small camper and specified the dimensions). They completely disregarded that and assigned us a site with no shade in sight, surrounded by giant campers. I would understand if that were fully booked… but at the end of the day they had plenty of nice spots in the shade, exactly what we asked for, that remained unoccupied. It’s like they read our request and went out of their way to give us the exact opposite!!

Great park.
we will continue to visit when to that way.
Shh.
Great location, very well managed and cared for.
Great staff and all you need in 1 place made a great start to our holiday adventure
Loved it plenty of activities and was just clean and nice

Great location!! Amazing park. The pool was so good the kids loved it and being so close to the beach was so easy. Really lovely activity staff for the kids.
The disappointment was the amenities. Always dirty!!!!! No matter what time we went, they were always gross. Filthy floors, showers and toilets. Especially at the pool!! My little one had an accident because of how dirty the pool toilet was, there was something (….) smeared all on the seat,  then when we tried walking to the toilet blocks she couldn’t hold it any longer. Poor thing was really embarrassed. I understand someone could mess it up even after the cleaners have just left but every time we needed a toilet we’d have to try find a better one. Really disappointing and just unsanitary.
Oh and the pool area had a decking section with lounge chairs. It ALWAYS smelt like urine. Everytime we walked past I gagged. People are on holidays and something like this just ruins an experience completely.
Also the cafe was good however multiple days their never had coffee or chai… really disappointing and just odd to run out of that.

This place is amazing for just everyone.
Good value for money
Close to the beach
Absolutely disgusting. Amenities were not cleaned daily. We were there for a week and the showers had the same hair, used bandaids, and soap in them every day. Will not stay here again.

Lovely park. So well organized, even sending a plan of where your caravan should be situated on site. Permanents separated from holiday makers. Such a great location, close to beach, river shops and walks. Great swimming pool and playground for kids . Very clean amenities.  I would recommend .
Great service and facilities. We stay each time we travel north.

Park was nice enough with plenty of facilities and things for the kids to do but 1 big let down was the toilets and showers. All of them had a weird smell and weird layout. Not very clean at the best of times. Also not much lighting over the far side past the playground towards the toilet blocks. Have to use a torch of a night time to get to the toilets as not enough lighting only near the toilets.
An excellent caravan park. Sites were easily accessed. Ensuite was very clean. The location is within an easy walk to shops and the waterfront. Lots of facilities for those with kids.

Called and made a booking around 05:00pm,  arrived at 11:30pm, paid 118$, the lady only asked the phone did not mention anything about having to check out at 10:00am as would’ve tried another cheaper option! We slept, had breakfast, were about to have a shower and get the kids to play on the water park but were told we needed to pack and leave within 30 min!

10 out of 10
Great place for little kids
$250 for a cabin with 5 beds very reasonable.
Was a great place to stay. Close to the beach and everything was not far away
Very well organized, clean facilities, friendly staff. Just stayed one night, so cannot give feedback on everything the park has to offer.

This is one of the best caravan parks we have stayed at. There is a real spirit of generosity, the facilities are above and beyond any where else we have stayed. Children are well catered for with a great pool and games room. |TV lounge has comfortable lounge chairs and the cafe with meals served is a great asset.|Highly recommended!

The front desk receptionist was lovely, very friendly and the kitchen was reasonably clean. However a big downfall for me was the sites available. We didn’t need a powered site as we have
a roof box tent so opted for the unpowered. A big thing with setting up tents is not to have them underneath trees as that’s a safety issue. Most of the unpowered sites were unoccupied and as we were looking at them I saw that all of them are underneath trees 😂. Managed to get a site that was semi clear and just took the risk, although we woke up to a lot of bird poo on our tent. Also the sites were right next to a road so we got woken up about 5:30am by cars going by. For the price ($45 pn) I just don’t think it is worth it. My partner also wanted to point out that the men’s bathroom was really filthy. They also said they’ve had some thefts recently so that didn’t really put us at ease.
The park is located in a great spot and is excellent for families with children. There are lots of activities and attractions for them. The facilities as a whole are also excellent!
An excellent park with great facilities and activities, located in an ideal spot.

Great location
Coffee A1
Amenities very clean.  Water temp in showers a bit of a challenge
Friendly organised reception , clean & neat drive through ensuite site, fun frenchman running the cafe, eftpos laundry. Great stay.

We stayed in this lovely park last week with our  caravan and had a great time. Facilities and amenities were excellent and clean. The shared kitchen, lounge and outdoor covered seating areas were great to retreat to. In particular when the weather is not too kind for camping, we had windy and rainy weather days on and off.

As a strong recommendation we would like it if all Big 4s make it a priority to provide separate bins for refundable liquid containers, such as bottles, cans etc, and also stress to all guests on check in, that these have to be used. It is ridiculous that in this day and age not more care and thought is given to this by all of us. No excuse is valid enough not to speed up the process of less landfill and unnecessary waste.

We loved the marina precinct, and Coffs Harbour and surrounds offer some great spots for daytrips, such as Sawtell and its lookouts, Sealy Lookout, Mutton bird Island at the marina, Bellingen, the hikes and lookouts along the Waterfall Way, Dorrigo for art and lunch etc etc. For breakfast, lunch or dining options you can use the great little cafe in the park, or one of the many options in Coffs itself of course.
Stayed in a cabin, plenty of room and good facilities. Close to the beach.

Last weekend from Friday to Monday of this week I had the extreme pleasure of hosting 6 of my oldest friends in the Seaview Villa. My girlfriends and I had an amazing stay at this park. We were accommodated comfortably in this Villa. The staff here are amazing, friendly, accommodating, and so very helpful. The night watchman was fantastic and even came and let himself be known to us in case we needed  him which of course we didn't. The Cafe staff were so helpful and friendly oh sorry I forgot funny too and the food was delicious and freshly cooked as you ordered it, no reheated stuff sitting in the warmer. With all of the above said we had an amazing time with lots of laughs and stacks of fun. To the staff that were on, thankyou for helping make our weekend an amazing reunion. I will definately recommend Big4 Park Beach Holiday Park as the place to stay. Thankyou so so much.
Kindest regards
Heather G. Coffs Harbour.
Nothing short of a great stay! |Spacious sights,|Spotless amenities,|Close to the water, |Loved that we had to option to securely store our van while on the island

From the moment the Manager John popped to our cabin to welcome us, I knew we had chosen well. Our cabin was very clean, the lounge was comfy and the bed was very comfortable and warm, with great pillows. There was a spacious verandah and seats and table, a clothes drying stand and a huge bedroom and bathroom. We didn’t have children with us but there are so many activities within the Holiday Park for children. There is a cafe on site and we enjoyed a lovely dinner of fish and chips and S&P calamari back in our cabin. The Holiday Park was extremely good value and we will definitely stay there again.
Great spot for family, we stayed in cabins this time and they were clean and roomy. The kids just loved the pool area and bouncing pillow. Will come back again!
Staff was very friendly and pleasant. Accommodation was clean and tidy. My wife and I had a very enjoyable holiday.

5 out of 5||We absolutely loved our stay here! The only negative thing we can say is, we wished we’d got there wailer to enjoy more of the things to do and stayed longer. This is on us not the caravan park. Villa was spotless and provided us with everything we need. All facilities were great and the kids had so much fun. We’re back there next week for our trip back down to Victoria. This is somewhere we would 100% stay again and for longer.
Love it  will be back!
sites were overgrown, and staff couldn't change the site yet plenty of free sites where we would have fitted while we were there
Actually answer the phone which most Tweed & Gold Coast parks do not. Got UP sites which is unusual for a big 4. Good facilities but gutters are a real disaster while trying to park van.

This park is hard to beat on location, walk across to the beach and the park itself has great features the kids loved. The let down for us though was the cabin cleanliness, and I'm not talking just the 'older feel' but outright dirty. Turn the shower on and watch the dirt was across the floor, have to clean down actual dirt off the kids mattresses before making the beds, physical dust layers across the skirtings and light switches, mould on the back of the bathroom door and the floor literally gritty underfoot. Retrain the cleaners and this is a cracking park.
And to finish on a positive, the staff were great but the fact the after hours bloke saw us drive in and took the time to introduce himself and let us he's around etc. That shows me they do care about their guests. Hopefully we just copped a poor clean during a busy schedule.

Rude staff at check in. Remonstrated as we didn't have a booking. Told us the camp was full but found us a powered site away from anyone, under a tree, no internet BUT plenty of FREE sites around us. They remained empty for the next 2 nights.
I wouldn't stay there again due to rude reception. Which is a shame as the location is great and the facilities (especially for kids) are excellent.
Nice place
Great location. We had renovated studio cabin. Good size for 2 people. Clean, comfortable.

The shared facilities were all clean and convenient.
The facilities were clean and convenient,
but the campsite we got was really disappointing.
Woke up to bird poop all over the top of our tent—
honestly, this spot shouldn’t be rented out again.
Hope we get a better site next time.

We stayed at the BIG4 Coffs Harbour park overnight on our way to Queensland. The park itself is great, so kid friendly with a lot of facilities. Our 18 month old loved the little kids park near the pool and the jumping pillow, and chasing the bush turkeys around! The only reason I am not giving it five stars is that we stayed in one of the beach side cabins, which were the most expensive of the rooms available, and the beds were SO UNCOMFORTABLE! Hard as a rock and I barely got any sleep because of it, if we stay here again it won't be in a room that's for sure. I get a better sleep on our blow up mattress. Great location and walking distance to everything we needed, but next time we will probably stay in a camping site instead.

We stayed in a cabin for a night on our way to Queensland and had a very relaxing and comfortable night. The staff were welcoming and very helpful and our cabin
was very clean and had everything that we needed. The park is well maintained and very quiet for a great nights sleep. While we didn't get to use the other park facilities,  there is an onsite cafe, great pool, and family-friendly activities for all. We have stayed before and will again in the future.
Great park right on the beach,  attentive and friendly staff, shame the weather has been shit
Very friendly staff with well maintained facilities will stay here again

We have stayed in many parks and not many tick all the boxes, well this one does.

Staff on arrival awesome.
Grounds perfectly maintained.
Cabin we had was in excellent condition.
Cabin was spotless and smelled clean.
Everything worked.
Groundskeeper seen cleaning every BBQ every morning.
Paths and lawn were like a golf course.
Onsite cafe.
Output golf.

We would have to say this is one of the cleanest and well kept parks we have ever stayed in.

If you like the smell of cigarettes and drunk idiots shouting all day, this is the park for you. Otherwise, avoid it. We booked for my daughter's birthday because it looked beautiful online, but it was a huge disappointment. Bathrooms are filthy, you can smell urine from outside the toilet block, and half the washers and dryers are broken. The cafe took 45 minutes to make two small takeaway coffees. We couldn’t even leave our van because the people next to us were outside smoking joints all day. Staff didn’t care . The welcome pack included a crime warning, and we didn’t feel safe at all. The place is packed with drunk groups gathering at every facility, smoking, drinking non-stop, and causing trouble. Not a family-friendly environment — we will never return.
Great location with plenty of amenities for a family break.

Last week was my second time in this place and I will choose it again if visiting Coffs Harbour area. Everything was handy, 50m away from the beach but still sheltered from the wind, 5 minutes drive to supermarkets and the picturesque harbour.
This time I went with a Motorhome during the second week of easter school holidays and it was quite busy, but still had the opportunity to relax since the people around were respectful and friendly.
I chose the powered site and it was perfect since it had the water supplies, grey water drainage and power in the spot just for that site. Across the road I had the facilities, with accesible bathrooms,  washing and ironing appliances and dump station even if practically no needed due little use of the built in toilet due to proximity to the full facilities.
There were plenty of activities for the kids to have fun alone and with the grownups, paid carts, pool, water games, parks, outdoor table-tennis, putt-putt, arcades and a bouncing trampoline.
The cafe on site had decent coffee and meals, no need to find another place outside to have a coffee. Price was acceptable compared to Sydney and shops around the park.
At reception you can find essentials if you come on a public holiday without provisions.

Do not think twice, just go and enjoy it!
Welcoming experience in a powered site.
Great park  they just need to clean the toilets more often than once a day when packed they were dirty need cleaning 2 times a day
Kids friendly, lots of activities for kids, clean and beautiful pool, clean amenities too.
Nice park and I’m here the 3rd time already but will be the last time as there are a lot of campers smoking and it smells bad. Especially traveling with kids, I try to stay at non smoking places.
Friendly and inviting
Loved our visit to Park Beach. Kids loved the pool, kart hire and walking out the back to the beach. We'll be back!

We stayed in a ‘hibiscus villa’. Upon arrival there was an overwhelming unpleasant chemical smell inside the cabin and upon closer inspection, I discovered black mould on the blinds as well as the lights above the double bed. The roller blinds appeared to be broken and I had to manually pull it down to get them to close. The villa is old and really needs a decent update. Many furnishings were dusty and the hand towel provided was dirty. The main bed was hard and quite uncomfortable to sleep on and one of the light bulbs in the living room did not work. The double bed was already made but there were no sheets on the bunks; these beds were very difficult to make and this minor detail would have been appreciated. ||Sheets and other towels were crisp and clean and some basic crockery and cooking implements were provided which was a plus. The split system air conditioner was also a positive point. ||The location to Park Beach is excellent and the kids really enjoyed the water play area. ||Unfortunately though, I cannot recommend this properly and we won’t be returning.

Big 4|cabins| the cabins master bedroom bed was comfy but the bunk bed one was harder than a rock the tv in the lounge room was the smallest tv in the world|Activites| the arcade is fun just don't do any games that gives prizes they are a scam the mini golf was fun definitely better that the one at the big banana there's a pool table but they only did yellow and black balls get the cues the triangle and the cues ball from reception there's also a pool with 2 waterslides the first one is definitely the funnest the second one there you were covered and it didn't go as fast as the first one I only went to the pool 2 times because there are way more fun stuff the pool also has a big bucket and a baby water slide for baby's the jumping pillow was fun I really liked it|the location is nice it's really close to the beach| I would give this a 4 and a half but you can't do that so in just gonna give this a 4

The cabins are getting very dated and a lot of the fittings and fixtures are broken (for example we couldn't close the blinds in our bedroom). They're not huge cabins either. There is everything you need in a cabin however and they do have nice little decks.
The park grounds are great, especially if you have kids. Pools, playgrounds, mini golf and two big community rooms. Plenty of space and BBQ areas are scattered around. There's a very well featured camp kitchen.
The park shop has a lot of the basics for food and groceries and there's a servo a couple of blocks away with hot food and groceries.
Location is very good, the surf club, the beach, the river and a big park are right across the road. It's not a huge walk down to the marina, the markets, or up the road to the pub.
This place is amazing ! Great location and  very clean rooms, great for family trips or just to stop off from a long drive.
Beautiful im from india this place is like heaven and beach on the side of the room are like 2 mins walk and the greenery is also like you are in paradise

Awesome place. Kids love the great pools and games room. Relax and know you are close to the ocean, the Sunday markets, Friday night food stalls, excellent walk or ride path takes you to the jetty, marina, north wall, south wall, beaches.  A short drive to main shopping centre or plaza. Very centrally located Big 4 park.
Perfect place for kids.
Fantastic sites. Right on the water edge.. Get a discount at the Bowls club on food and drink if you mention your staying at the caravan park
Had a wonderful visit!
An excellent park. We were up the back under the trees, near the train line… but it wasn’t as noisy as you might think. The trains go by so fast!

Great drive through site for our large van
Nice pool clean facilities close to beach

We camp in our campervan and this is a perfect place, super clean, nice shades from the trees and cool pool for the kids
Totally recommend and price was great, only 43

BE WARNED! Have just been charged $25 "Admin Fee" to have my credit card refunded even though I am outside of the 14 day cancellation period and should not be charged a cancellation fee but they still get you with an "Admin Fee". I could have kept a credit but it needed to be used within 12months and we usually stay for a sporting event that next year will be held outside of the 12months from today.
At $25 for a 4 min call plus lets say 6mins to process the card and send an email that puts them at $150/hr Admin rate. NOT IMPRESSED Park Beach Holiday Park! Never have I been charged a fee let a lone a fee as high as this to refund my credit card.
One of the best Big4 parks we’ve seen, cafe on site is great, staff were friendly and fixed an electrical problem promptly. Would recommend a stay here!
Sehr schöner Caravan Park speziell für Familien.  Die Pizza vom Pool Cafe waren klasse.
Absoluty loved it. Great experience. So close to the beach as well as all the kids activities. We had the best time.
Great spot for a holiday, they just recently added a new cafe on the park and the pool is great for all ages, sites and cabins are well maintained and clean

Love this park the location is perfect beach across the road.  Great riding walking to the Pier fantastic for kids teens and adults.  Walk to the Bowling Club or Hoey Moey Pub both great food.  Barefoot fun bowling at Bowling Club. Next to the outdoor eating area.   Cafe and takeaway in the park awesome pool basketball half court, games room. Go karts and putt putt golf!   Everything in Coffs no more than a 10 minute drive away.  Place is fantastic! My only criticism is the wifi dies not reach the sites on the edges of the park and for teens who want to watch movies at night etc not great hot spotting from phone was not easy either as signal not great.  Otherwise fabulous.

23.01.2025
Mein Mann und ich sind mit dem Wohnmobil unterwegs durch die Ostküste Australien und sind durch Zufall auf diesen Campingplatz gestoßen. Wir sind begeistert.
1. Sicherheit
2.Sauberkeit
3.Ordnung
4. ruhig
5. sehr gut gelegen nahe an den Strand
6. Pool für die Kinder geeignet
7. Familien mit Kindern
8. Nachtruhe
9.Waschraum
10.Toiletten mit Duschkabinen
11. Café
12. gute Wege wo kleine Kinder Fahrrad fahren können.
13.Spielplatz
14. Minigolf

Und so weiter…
Wir sind hier nur 3 Tage und reisen weiter.
Dankeschön das wir hier im Park Beach sein durften.

What a wonderful park we stated 3 night
Great pool wonderful Cafe Great food. Large area to park your van.
Would definitely recommend this par
Awesome location across from the beach. Our kids loved the facilities, pool was awesome and everyone was genuinely friendly to deal with.

The accommodation was disgraceful.  There was ants every where. They were on the bed, lounge and kitchen. The amount of money we paid was enormous for no air conditioner, no, toilet or bathroom. Almost $1300 for a week. It was not worth $20 a night. So disgraceful

Caravan parks that thinks it's a 5 star resort is falling short on both counts. Facilities poorly maintained and never updated sites un mowed on arrival, manager never on site  and staff have no clue on what goes on in park

Amazing place and location. The kids had a great time. WOW the pool was just so good everyday we went and had a blast. The amenities were clean and nice. We stayed there a weekend and enjoyed it. Would recommend

It is a caravan/camping/cabin park. Short walk to the beach. Well managed. During the summer vacation it is fully booked although we were able to get a non water/non electric caravan site at the last minute.

Absolutely loved the place!
You can seriously ride a bike to EVERYTHING!!!
The park is super clean, there’s ones for the kids. Not only are the staff fantastic but so is everything in the park.
I cannot recommend the place more if I tried.

The only reason that I’m able to rightfully give this a single star is because I was with my friends the rest of it was wrecked and abolished by the horrible security cards that broke the rules. I felt scared at one point as he came into my personal bubble and proximity and I felt rightful to the fact that they were being louder than us well arguing against us being loud They were enforcing a rule and using power and entrapment so that we would break the rules we had a security guard come in and tell us off about noise as he was Vaping in a no smoking area. This made me feel unsafe as I have asthmatic behaviours with my lungs. I have been known to have asper attacks and I take a preventer. It is a great place to spend with your family but just beware of the security guard. We need Greg and Lisa back???
Too expensive

Loved this holiday park!  Haven't been to many, but this one was great. We stayed three nights – three kids, my partner, and me.  The pool was awesome for everyone, and it's close to everything, even the beach (a quick 10-minute walk). They have a little cafe open daily for all meals, with reasonable prices. You can grab fish and chips for the kids and eat poolside.  The showers and toilets were well-maintained, and if you get a site with fake grass, someone even cleans it daily! We'll definitely be back.
Did not use accommodation

We turned up without a booking looking for a cabin for the night but they were all booked out
The park looked very good

Einer der größten und schönsten Anlagen die wir auf der gesamten Ostküste hatten.
Mit eigenen Café-/ Restaurant.
Stayed here for 2 nights on a powered site, very clean amenities and friendly staff. Will be back in the future!
Pool area is great and the park was clean and in a good location. If you eat at the cafe just a heads up that it comes up as a pizza shop in mylestom on your bank records
Everything about this place was great, would highly recommend
Large but quiet park. Great cafe beside pool. Clean amenities. Friendly staff. Highly recommended.
Awesome spot great for the kids and close to the beach everything you need in one place

went there could not fit into allocated spot had to used two spots office phone rang out call back within 24 hours went to office rang again outside the office both staff there not busy phone to answer machine call you back within 24hours?? left park 8am next morning both boom gates up couldnt pin out message 10 am saying because not checked out pay for another day?? disappointed
Gets very busy and the sites are a bit small.

Stayed on a grass site which was fine in itself, but unfortunately this is not a great place to relax. First night here and 2 people were having a yelling match at 1am, then cars were moving around the park. Not impressed by the amenities, when we arrived. Dirty toilets and showers. Disappointed as was planning on bringing family back for a week long trip but now reconsidering

I've stayed in a lot of Big4's and have to say this without doubt is the best so far!!. Clean, manicured sites and amenities with great security for enter/exit as well as keypads for toilets. Cafe on site that serves everything from coffee, toasties, muffins from 7am was a great way to start our day. So close to the beach across the road for a dip and a state of the art pool area for the kids. Txt msgs daily on what's on for the day from movie nights etc. These guys are organised and know how to run a park.
Will come back again!!
We love staying here, well maintained,clean and a great location

Great facilities for kids and lots of organised activities. Food at the cafe was average but the staff were nice. The pool and water park are pretty good, but in comparison to other big4, it's a little lacking. Don't think we will stay there again but if we did I would NOT book a powered site under the trees again. The nuts on the roof, the stink beetles, ants and mosquitoes were next level. IF I was to stay again I'd book the drive through ensuite spots away from the trees all together.

Location... mmmm there are MUCH nicer spots at northern/southern beaches.

Must commend the facilities - laundry was GREAT and modern AND they have a family bathroom - that's understanding your customers - SO much easier with little ones to be able to shower together in a private room. Actually I'd probably be convinced to go back just for that - if you have a small bub there is even a little tub - how great is that!!!??? And it's clean - it's located in the laundry ;)
Awesome!!
Awesome!
Fabulous. Can’t wait to go back. Maybe the best we’ve ever experienced.
Great location pool needs to be heated that's all

We requested a no tree area because of the height of our van. We got trees. At book in we had to wait 30mins after the the book 8n time because staff did not have site clean list at book in time. We were there one night. Wanted to see a couple of things before leaving in the morning. Time we didn't have. So this added time on wait and book in and parking, unpacking ect, we were not happy.

Excellent facilities for the whole family, and great for the lone traveller. The park is very well kept and staff are friendly and helpful.
Prices are quite reasonable considering the quality of amenities. But are considerably dearer in the school holidays, ouch!
Location is very close to the beach and shops.
Other campers told me that it is the best park that they have been to.

Lovely well-kept park. Great showers with plenty of hot water. Lots of activites for children. Unfortunately, the security was lacking with security system not working and had not been working for some months. A vehicle was stolen from near us and people were coming off beach using amenities.
Not A Bad Place There. They Got Coffee Here. & Lunch & Dinner Too. & The Internet Was Working Very Well. 7/10
The rooms where outstanding they were squeaky clean. It was a very kid safe at the park the pool was the best part

Really good park for the kids, mini golf,jumping pillow, pool with slides and dunk bucket, cafe pretty good and area is  quiet. 2 km walk to harbourside and another km to muttonbird island, beach 100m, dog beach 500 m. Good spot.
Excellent park to relax and plenty for the kids to do.

I'm giving it a 2 stars as the staff were friendly.
We walked into our cabin that smelt strongly of cleaning products, but when that wore off it smelt mouldy and wet.

After being told at reception that my booking was for next year not this year, for one night and told they had nothing available, I rung to cancel and get a refund and was told on the phone that they have cabins available. On returning to the reception and saying there are available cabins, I was looked at funny. Ended up with a room for the night and was very impressed with the cabin. I feel like I was judged at my first appearance at the reception. We had just traveled 9 hours.

Lovely place with great amenities and a lots of activities for kids and adults alike. The staff were very friendly and helpful. There’s also a cafe and restaurant on site and the whole place is kept very clean and tidy. There are a variety of accommodation types like cabins, houses, powered and non-powered campsites, grass and concreted sights. We spent a night on a powered site in our camper; had no issues at all and would definitely recommend.

Cadre très agréable avec la plage juste à côté.
Tout ce qu’il faut dans les bungalows !

Cabin rooms dated and small.
Beds were tiny and very hard and uncomfortable. All beds were not even made even though we specifically asked for them to be made, as we had the same issue on the first leg of our trip.
Everything just a bit run down. Blinds broken.
Tiny toilet and shower rooms.
Ocean view cabins are not ocean view.
Positives - location and mini golf.
If they could just refresh the cabins and beds this would very a great place to stay.

My 3 night stay was lovely. The campsite and amenities were clean, and the whole park was quiet. The coffee and food from the cafe was delicious. A great location to the beach and an easy walk to the plaza. Such friendly staff!

This is the best caravan park we have ever been to.  The staff is very very nice and caring and  the caravan park is very well maintained and cleaned.

I HIGHLY HIGHLY recommend this caravan park. Out of 1-10, we give it a 1000.

The cafe is very nice too.

Evelyn and Hans Arich
Excellent as always.

Fantastic stay and super clean amenities. Our only major problem was at site 301 in unpowered camping. We woke in the morning to find our entire car cover in bird poo. I don't know what birds they have in Coffs Harbour, but they must be massive. We weren't able to find a hose, so we had to spend $30 cleaning it at the local car wash. Otherwise, great stay and friendly staff.

Great location, clean and price.

Had a good time here thanks!

We went to this big 4 and paid for a nice, 2 room cabin near the pool. When we arrived, the cleaning staff were still in the room and we had to wait by the pool. We were there for around 2 hours. Then an ambulance arrived because the lady cleaning had electrocuted herself. So we were sent to another room to ensure that our room was safe enough and no one could test this until the next day. Fair enough.
The room we got was horrible. It was a cabin away at the back, covered in webs,
Looked like it hadn’t been touched in who knows how long.
Long story short, I wouldn’t go back to this one. We complained since we paid for the bigger cabin and were not getting the experience we had paid for. They offered a small reimbursement.
Pro - the pool was good for the kids.

Great caravan park, we really enjoyed our stay. Amenities were clean and new. Grounds well maintained. Friendly staff.
Awesome location by the beach and channel.
Great caravan park. Very clean. Lovely sites. Close to beach.

Pretty terrible experience. Beds were like sleeping on concrete. Originally we’re meant to stay for 2 nights ended up leaving after the first night. My kids, husband & myself woke up with sore backs. The cabin we stayed in was the ocean view.. uhhh what ocean view?? Do you meant the view of the fence or perhaps the road??? The toilet was that small the door literally hits the toilet seat when you go to open or shut the door. The toilet roll holder and the shower shelf both broken, blinds were snapped, pillows smelt musty. We have stayed at many Big 4’s and this ranks second worst on our list. Never again! Wasted $250 for a night we didn’t even stay because it was that terrible. On check out we weren’t even asked why we were checking out early or even if we enjoyed our stay.
The staff were very accommodating. Good on site Cafe.

Whilst this a huge park and very family oriented, we appreciated the thought given to us, a mature couple, in locating us away from the jumping pillow and playground but close enough to the pool and cafe. Staff were friendly and helpful. Location is fabulous and amenities spot on. Can highly recommend.

Quiet, clean well appointed holiday park offering various accommodation options from camping to a luxury Villa. Water park, pool, kids play centre with poolside cafe. Playgrounds and jumping pillow. Well equipped camp kitchen. There’s something for everyone to enjoy ☺️
Love it...
Great place for a holiday 👌
Great spot, even in the rain, lovely bacon and egg roll at the on-site Cafe.

We stayed in a tent, the location, people are amazing. An absolute must for all families and dogs lol
Out of 10, I'd give it a solid 10
Clean and decent rooms for overnight stay
Great location. Rooms were a bit dated. Kids loved the pool and park and the staff were very helpful and friendly.
Great for kids, lots to do. Cabin was awesome slept 8 and had a washing machine. Bonus. Great staff.
This must be one of the best parks on the coast. My wife and I love love love it !

This is a terrific park for families but unfortunately not as good for couples.
Its location is great, close to beautiful beaches, the marina, Mutton Bird Island, and restaurants and cafes are within walking distance.
Facilities are clean and new, staff are friendly and helpful, there's a cafe on site for a coffee (which can be good or bad depending on the barista) and take away food. The pools ideal for kids with lots of small play areas build into the design, but unfortunately, it is not so good for adult swimming.
Unfortunately, it is also an extremely noisy caravan park, trucks where left running beside our van site for long periods of time, just left rumbling away empty and unfortunately the gardening staff, although doing a fantastic job of the grounds, where forever running motorised equipment and driving noisy vehicles around continually.
I'd recommend this park for families and for location, but unfortunately, not for a couple wanting to get away for a week's holiday for a relaxing time.

Two of us stayed at Big4 Park Beach Holiday Park in Coffs Harbour. Located near to the beach, the holiday park has secure access with a passcode required for toilet/showers and beach gate entry. Ammenities are clean and well-maintained and staff are friendly.

For anyone interested, Coffs Harbour parkrun occurs every Saturday morning at 7am, and it is just a 50m walk from the holiday park gate.

Check your site before you set up , some sites are bad for pooling in the middle due to poor maintenance and levels  . We had 40mm deep water at our camper door which made things very muddy . Park somewhat tried to rectify with us but that’s a long story . We weren’t  keen to move our family of 6 - tents and camper to another site and lose half a day of our short stay . Amenities seemed to not be cleaned over the weekend and were gross , the shower falls were that bad that they ran out into the bathroom walkway . Pools and deck area was nice .
Very good location.

I had a pleasant 7nts stay in my van. Well maintained, cleaned, friendly staff, the grounds are lovely, lots of trees, green grass, chirping birds, close to walk to the beach, can hear the surf from my van
Wonderful location, clean cabin, clean amenities, the pool and slides were a big hit.
Position, amenities and service.
amazing service great park
The place is good for living and easy access to the town.
Fantastic location for an RV stopover.  All necessary facilities.

Stayed in a very cute, clean & comfortable cabin with the family. The kids loved the pool & play areas (toddlers), as parents we loved the vibe of the caravan park so much so we have just purchased a caravan & cannot wait to come back & explore the coast more.
Just lovely people and great atmosphere
Always a great place to stay
cabin was close to where we needed to be for a wedding. Staff were great and we managed to extend for a day and have a late checkout. Very accomodating place and great value.
This holiday park is one of the best I have ever seen! Our unit was simply beautiful, modern, spacious and clean. Highly satisfied!
Trains are so loud and baby plovers in our campsite. Overpriced because of these things. Very clean facilities though, I liked the jumping pillow. But the trains woke me up multiple times

Large caravan park with plenty of amenities.
You can wash and dry your clothes here.
Swimming pool and plenty of playgrounds on site for kids to get busy.

The beach is 3 minutes away.

It gets extremely busy during holidays.

Late check-in available on request.
In 10 years will be better
This is my second visit and it's the perfect family holiday!

We've stayed here three times and it's our favourite holiday park. Best pool by far and so close to the beach.  We've stayed both at a powered tent site and the cabins. Great value for money. We always enjoy our stay here and can't wait to come again.

Pricey for not a great site. Tight camp spots, overcrowded, toilet & shower facilities limited for such a crowded site and not very modern or clean. Most sites have no grass left, just dirt. Pool was so busy, you wouldn't want to go in there. Camp kitchen small and not very clean, kids scooting through the kitchen throughout dinner time. Reception is very swish, it seems all the money has gone there to make that but nice but rest of the park not so good.
Good
Sensational place loads of things to do for the kids great service at reception and everything is really enjoyable.
Good place to stay - safe and secure, and very close to safe beach/river front with safe swimming.

Have been to Big4 Park Beach for 6 years in a row and absolutely loved it. The location is perfect - near beautiful Park Beach & cafes, shops etc are all close if you need them, as well as the Big Banana and Tree Tops etc. The park itself is beautifully maintained and we are always blown away at the cleanliness of the cabin we stay in each year. The pool, waterslides and other facilities are a paradise for the kids and adults... A bonus lately has been the Super-fast Wi-Fi now available everywhere in the park. I cant fault this place ! Well done !!
Fantastic Park! Kids loved it so much they didn’t want to leave. So many activities to do and the pool is the best. We stayed in a cabin and it was perfect. Best Holiday!
Great location close to the beach and harbour, excellent facilities including pool, camp kitchen and pool.  Some staff can be difficult and uncooperative

One of the best stays we've had. Kids loved the pool and the big Pillow. Beach access is just across the road. Walk to the Sealife rescue center. Staff were very friendly, helpful. We'll be back for sure

Absolutely meets expectations.
Staff was friendly.
We stayed in a sea breeze Villa, basic but okay, good value for money.
Right at the beach. Decent pool with slides. Nothing to complain about.
Excellent place!
We loved our stay in a cabin. Everything was clean and the cabin had everything we needed. The facilities in the park were great, loved the pool and mini golf. Easy access to the beach

Pool closed for approximately a week due to ‘emergency repairs’. Very disappointing. One of the main reasons for booking this accommodation was for the pool. Now we have 6 very disappointed kids. Offered admission to a council pool 8 minutes drive away. Emailed our disappointment to the accommodation but never received a reply. Staff didn’t seem bothered and didn’t mention during check in. No offer of a discount or cancellation.

Good location, Just 2min walk from the beach and 5 min drive from the main road
Bathroom is clean and shower water pressure is good
WiFi signal is weak so unusable
Great park for the kids
The staff are very friendly and the whole place is great, will be back

Just completed a stay , found out Villa really clean. Very comfy bed. Lovely spacious bathroom. Housekeeping staff very friendly.
Nov 6 th
Great accommodation in a great location,  great activities for the kids, happy hour to meet other travellers.  Close to shopping facilities, restaurants and beach inlet.  Will be back

Had a mostly pleasant one night stay at this caravan park during Sept 23. Our tent site was spacious and grassy. Access to both the beach and Coffs Creek/Park Beach reserve was handy through secure access gate. Camp kitchen was a good size and well equipped. Lighting after dark was OK. Not a restful night though owing to new arrivals after dark making no effort to settle in quietly and the regular passing of noisy goods trains. Bathrooms not very modern, with common drains running beneath the showers and hot water taps opening in opposite direction.

Bel campeggio in posizione stupenda davanti a una spiaggia incantevole le piazzole sono ampie e pulite come pure i servizi igienici e gli ambienti in comune c’è anche una bella piscina e in pochi minuti di bici si raggiunge la riserva naturale di Mittonbird

Weve been travelling a round Aus and this was 1 of our favorite cv parks.great pool,although cold,camp kitchen,with much wanted oven,games room,play equipment and pillow for kids and walking distance to shops and beach.
Solid holiday park, nice pool for kids!
Busy park but facilities were good.
great place
Lovely camp park. Walking distance to bowls club for meals. Receptionist was very professional and knowledgeable.
Large caravan park,beautiful swimming pool & gardens across from the beach ⛱️busier this visit as its school holidays 🌞

Nice big park, with a great waterpark/pool for kids. Lovely location. Great that the mini golf is free of charge. Downside at this park are the amenities. The shower/toilet block never seemed to be completely clean, the water from the showers ran off into drains in the walkway of the toilet block, so the floor was constantly wet and dirty. The showers seemed to always have soap etc on the walls and the sinks look liked they haven’t been wiped out in ages (it looked like this the whole time we were there). Not sure how often they are cleaned. The family bathroom is also tiny with no changing area for a baby, makes it kind of useless for a family with small children to use.

Great holiday park and right across the road from the beach. Waterpark is excellent for children, would be great if they had a heated pool for colder days. The kids had a blast playing mini golf and the playground are good too

We stayed in a villa for 5 people for up to a week. The park was great for entertaining children and being family friendly but the cleanliness of our villa was a let down and it would have been more comfortable if we had our amenities upkept mid-week like new towels, fresh sheets and general clean.

This caravan place is awesome and my 8 years old was upset to leave this place! I felt a lot space and the pool was amazing! Only one issue was the caravan site there was branch hanging over which find difficult to park correctly trying to not get it hit! Needs trimming the branches! Perfect shade and facility has everything! Definitely would return again!

Very nice park stayed a week.
Need mop in showers.
Great park. Friendly and helpful staff. Good location with great amenities. Would stay here again. Good value.
Really great caravan park...very clean and well designed...

What a lovely stay we had in our caravan.  Immaculate treed grounds, amenities and the friendliest reception we have had in a long time.  Love the direct beach access through the park.  Some of the sites are a bit tight, so if you have a big van let the girls know.
Clean, modern & so close to the sea! This park has won awards for good reasons!
Generally clean and well serviced facilities.
Great place to stay

Depending on cabins U get ones without toilet and shower very average. .
Get dearer cabins bigger cabins very good ones near pool seem be better cabins they have car parkings one I had this trip no car parking next cabin park Ur car away from cabin if had a car

Have just had 8 nights at caravan park and this would be one of the best parks we have stayed at. The grounds and facilities are so well cared for, everything is exceptionally clean and tidy. We had an ensuite site and it was fantastic - a great shower with lots of water pressure. Thank you for providing such a great place to relax and enjoy. Look forward to our next visit
Great run park nice office staff very clean showers and toilets close walking distance to beach, and town, and club ,and restaurants
Friendliest most helpful Staff in Australia!!!

Thanks to the staff for you super, efficient and caring attitude ,as we were travelling we stopped in for a few days to stay and unfortunately we had car trouble.We approached the staff at front office and they we kind enough to let us stay longer than anticipated with nothing but support and understanding they made us feel at home.
Thanks guys your support over the last few days it has been encouraging.And couldn’t recommend this Big 4 enough.
Andrew and Nikky Price
Had a powered site at Coffs, near all facilities, was nice and peaceful, thoroughly enjoyed my stay.
Loved staying here, great facilities, staff and location
Toilet cleaning not up to scratch.  Lost power to much of the park for a number of hours. Given choice of 4 sites.. all the same price but great variation in quality of site.
It’s very good caravan site and also lots of fun for kids and beach access from the back. They also have water activities for kids.
Great location for a holiday easy walking distance to the beach and plenty of night life at the very close pub
Went tenting on an unpowered site, was very large. Bbq area was great. Showers were warm at best. Unfortunately no fire places which is a bit of let down.
Me and my family had a great time at this clean and safe accommodation.
Clean and specious. We loved it 👍

Just average really. I was not wowed at all. We booked an ensuite that was fully functional with a great powerful shower but it was just a little old and tatty.

The location was great but we did get a couple of noisy passing trains in the night.

Great place to stay with everything you could need. Camp kitchen was great .Place is very well maintained which is a plus. Kids had an amazing time playing the mini golf. Great walk to the beach. Would definitely stay here again.
My wife and I spent 3 wonderful nights here. Very clean, helpful staff and a perfect location, close to all amenities.
Clean amenities, friendly staff, quiet (while I was there), great location, a tidy, well managed campgrounds. As Arnie would say: I’ll be back!
